page.title: Documents
page.description: Upload files — the system extracts the text, marks it up and makes it searchable
page.liveTooltip: Statuses of your uploads update live
page.searchPlaceholder: Find a document by file name
page.chunksHint: How many pieces the text is split into for search: answers are assembled from these fragments

hypothesesDoc.hint: This document already contains ready-made hypotheses (brainstorm results). It is excluded from hypothesis generation and verification so the system never passes these ideas off as its own — it is used only as already-considered directions.

page.stillIndexing: The document is still being indexed
page.emptyFiltered: No documents found — change the search or filter
page.emptyNoDocs: No documents yet — upload the first one
page.loadErrorState: Failed to load documents — check your connection and try again.
page.duplicate: "{{name}}" is already in the knowledge base — no re-indexing needed
page.uploadingBatch_one: Uploading {{count}} file — statuses will update as indexing progresses
page.uploadingBatch_other: Uploading {{count}} files — statuses will update as indexing progresses
page.uploadingBatchArchives_one: Uploading {{count}} file — archives are unpacked on the server, their contents appear as separate documents
page.uploadingBatchArchives_other: Uploading {{count}} files — archives are unpacked on the server, their contents appear as separate documents
page.dropHint: PDF, DOCX, Excel, schema images, archives

preview.originalUnavailable: The original file is unavailable — showing the recognized text of the document.
preview.alsoAnswers: Also answers your question — click to jump there
preview.contentFailed: Failed to load the document content
preview.snippetOnly: The full source text is unavailable — showing the cited fragment.
preview.matchesOutside: some matches are outside the preview

viewer.noInlinePreview: This file cannot be viewed in the browser — click "Download" to open it.

upload.noEtag: S3 did not return the part ETag (check CORS ExposeHeaders)
upload.partNetwork: network failure while uploading a part
